languages.original_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

languages.text: "Люди, что умервщляют плоть жизнью, полной лишений, следуют пути Неумирающего, знают они о том или нет. Законы и правила лишь отдалят их от искренности служения".

"People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."
languages.original_text: "Люди, что умервщляют плоть жизнью, полной лишений, следуют пути Неумирающего, знают они о том или нет. Законы и правила лишь отдалят их от искренности служения".

traits.locale_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

"People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

"People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

languages.text: 「肉体を苦しめる生活を送る者は、知らずとも不死者の道を行く。法律や規則は、誠実な奉仕から彼らを遠ざけるに過ぎない」
languages.original_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

traits.locale_text: 「肉体を苦しめる生活を送る者は、知らずとも不死者の道を行く。法律や規則は、誠実な奉仕から彼らを遠ざけるに過ぎない。」

languages.text: « Ceux qui se mortifient en menant une vie de privation suivent la voie de l'Immortel, qu'ils en aient conscience ou non. Les lois et les règles ne feront que diluer la sincérité de leur service. »
languages.original_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

traits.locale_text: « Ceux qui se mortifient en menant une vie de privation suivent la voie de l'Immortel, qu'ils en aient conscience ou non. Les lois et les règles ne feront que diluer la sincérité de leur service. »

languages.text: "Menschen, die ihr Fleisch mit einem Leben voller Entbehrungen beschämen, folgen wissentlich oder unwissentlich dem Weg des Todlosen. Gesetze und Regeln bringen sie nur von der Aufrichtigkeit ihres Dienstes ab."
languages.original_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

traits.locale_text: "Menschen, die ihr Fleisch mit einem Leben voller Entbehrungen beschämen, folgen wissentlich oder unwissentlich dem Weg des Todlosen. Gesetze und Regeln bringen sie nur von der Aufrichtigkeit ihres Dienstes ab."

languages.text: "Yokluk dolu bir hayatla etlerini terbiye eden insanlar, bilseler de bilmeseler de Ölmeyen'in yolunu izliyor. Kanunlar ve kurallar onları yalnızca hizmetin samimiyetinden uzaklaştıracaktır."
languages.original_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

traits.locale_text: "Yokluk dolu bir hayatla etlerini terbiye eden insanlar, bilseler de bilmeseler de Ölmeyen'in yolunu izliyor. Kanunlar ve kurallar onları yalnızca hizmetin samimiyetinden uzaklaştıracaktır."

languages.text: «Las personas que mortifican su propia carne con una vida de privaciones siguen la senda del Inmortal, aunque ni siquiera lo sepan. Imponerles leyes solo servirá para distanciarlos de la sinceridad con la que sirven».
languages.original_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

traits.locale_text: «Las personas que mortifican su propia carne con una vida de privaciones siguen la senda del Inmortal, aunque ni siquiera lo sepan. Imponerles leyes solo servirá para distanciarlos de la sinceridad con la que sirven».

languages.text: “那些以苦修和自我克制磨炼肉身之人，无论自知与否，都已踏上了不死之神的道路。律法与规章只会将他们与奉献的纯粹之心隔离。”
languages.original_text: "People who mortify their flesh with a life of deprivation are following the way of the Undying One, whether or not they know it. Laws and rules will only distance them from the sincerity of service."

traits.locale_text: “那些以苦修和自我克制磨炼肉身之人，无论自知与否，都已踏上了不死之神的道路。律法与规章只会将他们与奉献的纯粹之心隔离。”
